mapper.select:
/* adm-item-mixshipitemimposs-sql-oracle.xml - selectMixShipItemImpossHdCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT A.OWKEY ,O.OWNM ,A.GRPID ,A.GRPNM ,A.GRPFLAG ,A.CMT ,A.INSERTDATE ,A.INSERTURKEY ,A.UPDATEDATE ,A.UPDATEURKEY ,A.DELYN FROM TADMIN_MST_NOMIX_HD A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_OW O ON A.OWKEY = O.OWKEY ) AA
#{SEARCH_CONDITION}

/* adm-item-mixshipitemimposs-sql-oracle.xml - selectMixShipItemImpossDt */ SELECT '0' AS CHK ,A.GRPID ,B.SUBGRPID ,B.OWKEY ,A.GRPNM ,A.GRPFLAG ,B.ICGRTYPE ,B.ICGRPKEY ,'ICGRTYPE' ||';'|| B.ICGRTYPE AS ICGRTYPE_DESC ,C.ICGRPNM ,D.ICKEY ,D.ICNM ,B.LOGGRPCD ,'LOGGRPCD' ||';'|| B.LOGGRPCD AS LOGGRPCD_DESC ,B.INSERTDATE ,B.UPDATEDATE , B.INSERTURKEY , B.UPDATEURKEY ,D.UDF3 FROM TADMIN_MST_NOMIX_HD A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_NOMIX_DT B ON A.GRPID = B.GRPID AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICGR C ON B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.ICGRPKEY = C.ICGRPKEY AND B.ICGRTYPE = C.ICGRPTYPE LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC D ON B.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = D.ICKEY WHERE A.GRPID = #{grpid} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.DELYN = #{delyn} AND A.GRPFLAG = #{grpflag} ORDER BY B.UPDATEDATE DESC
